pages.text: Zenande lives with her mama and brother in KwaMashu. She loves playing outside with her toys.

blocks.text: Zenande lives with her mama and brother in KwaMashu.
She loves playing outside with her toys.

pages.text: One morning, Mama tells Zenande that she won’t be able to play outside. Zenande is sad.

blocks.text: One morning, Mama tells Zenande that she won’t be able to play outside.

pages.text: She looks outside and sees fallen trees, a lot of water on the roads, houses washed away and cars standing still.

blocks.text: She looks outside and sees fallen trees, a lot of water on the roads, houses washed away and cars standing still.

pages.text: Her house is flooded, some windows are broken, and her favourite mango tree is gone.

blocks.text: Her house is flooded, some windows are broken, and her favourite mango tree is gone.

pages.text: “We had heavy rains last night, so much wind and a lot of thunder,” Mama explains.

blocks.text: “We had heavy rains last night, so much wind and a lot of thunder,” Mama explains.

pages.text: “Wow!” Zenande is confused. “Does this mean we are never ever getting out of the house?”

blocks.text: “Wow!” Zenande is confused. “Does this mean we are never ever getting out of the house?”

pages.text: “Oh no, mntanami,” laughs Mama. “It is safe to go outside now. Let’s go and help Gogo Zondi!”

blocks.text: “It is safe to go outside now. Let’s go and help Gogo Zondi!”

pages.text: Mama and Zenande go across the road to see Gogo Zondi. Her face cheers up.

blocks.text: Mama and Zenande go across the road to see Gogo Zondi.

pages.text: The neighbours are already mopping the floors and drying clothes and blankets outside for Gogo Zondi.

blocks.text: The neighbours are already mopping the floors and drying clothes and blankets outside for Gogo Zondi.

pages.text: “I bought you some sweets, Gogo,” Zenande says. “You are such a special young girl.” Gogo Zondi is smiling.

blocks.text: “I bought you some sweets, Gogo,” Zenande says.
“You are such a special young girl.” Gogo Zondi is smiling.

pages.text: “I feel so much better with all of you helping me,” says Gogo Zondi. “Helping you has helped me feel better, Gogo!” Zenande smiles.

blocks.text: “I feel so much better with all of you helping me,” says Gogo Zondi.
“Helping you has helped me feel better, Gogo!” Zenande smiles.
